meta.summary: HMMER 3.4 command suite for profile HMM construction, sequence homology search, domain annotation, and bundled Easel sequence/alignment utilities.
meta.description: HMMER 3.4 command suite for profile HMM construction, sequence homology search, domain annotation, and bundled Easel sequence/alignment utilities.

test: hmmbuild -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.4' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.4' >/dev/null && hmmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F '# HMMER 3.4' >/dev/null
taf-hmmer-entrypoint --help | grep -F 'HMMER 3.4 command suite' >/dev/null && taf-hmmer-entrypoint --version | grep -F '# HMMER 3.4' >/dev/null

hmmalign -h >/dev/null && hmmconvert -h >/dev/null && hmmemit -h >/dev/null && hmmfetch -h >/dev/null && hmmlogo -h >/dev/null && hmmpress -h >/dev/null && hmmstat -h >/dev/null && jackhmmer -h >/dev/null && phmmer -h >/dev/null && nhmmer -h >/dev/null && nhmmscan -h >/dev/null && makehmmerdb -h >/dev/null
hmmpgmd -h >/dev/null && hmmpgmd_shard -h >/dev/null && alimask -h >/dev/null && hmmsim -h >/dev/null && esl-reformat -h >/dev/null && esl-seqstat -h >/dev/null && easel -h >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hmmer-build-search && cd /tmp/taf-hmmer-build-search && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/fn3.sto . && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/7LESS_DROME . && hmmbuild fn3.hmm fn3.sto >/dev/null && hmmstat fn3.hmm | grep -F 'fn3' >/dev/null && hmmemit -c fn3.hmm > fn3-consensus.fa && test -s fn3-consensus.fa && hmmsearch --tblout hits.tbl fn3.hmm 7LESS_DROME >/dev/null && grep -F '7LESS_DROME' hits.tbl >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hmmer-scan && cd /tmp/taf-hmmer-scan && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/fn3.hmm . && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/7LESS_DROME . && hmmpress fn3.hmm >/dev/null && hmmscan --tblout scan.tbl fn3.hmm 7LESS_DROME >/dev/null && grep -F 'fn3' scan.tbl >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hmmer-gzip-easel && cd /tmp/taf-hmmer-gzip-easel && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/fn3.hmm . && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/fn3.sto . && gzip -c fn3.hmm > fn3.hmm.gz && hmmstat fn3.hmm.gz | grep -F 'fn3' >/dev/null && esl-reformat fasta fn3.sto > fn3.fa && esl-seqstat fn3.fa | grep -F 'Number of sequences' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hmmer-nhmmer && cd /tmp/taf-hmmer-nhmmer && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/MADE1.hmm . && cp /opt/hmmer/share/doc/hmmer/tutorial/dna_target.fa . && nhmmer --tblout nh.tbl MADE1.hmm dna_target.fa >/dev/null && grep -F 'MADE1' nh.tbl >/dev/null && makehmmerdb dna_target.fa dna.hmmerdb >/dev/null && test -s dna.hmmerdb
